import axios from 'axios'; import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; export default function AddGroup() { const [groups, setGroups] = useState([]) useEffect(()=>{ axios.post("http://localhost:5555/groups") .then(groups=>setGroups(groups.data)) .catch(err=>console.log(err)) },[]) return (
